name: Ever After High - Wonderland High Edition
description:
This is an Ever After High RP/RPG but in Wonderland at the Wonderland High school. I included a lot of Ever After High characters and their descriptions in case you wanna use them but specifically the wonderland characters which are Madeline Hatter, Bunny Blanc, Lizzie Hearts, Chase Redford, Alistair Wonderland, Courtly Jester, Mad Hatter, Queen of Hearts, Kitty Cheshire, Cheshire Cat, Lily White, Red Queen, White Queen, and White Rabbit. The characters I gave descriptions on are:
